basic_details.job_title: SGMH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 58 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital (SGMH Delhi) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 18 June 2026 on the official website of SGMH Delhi. A total of 58 vacancies have been announced through the SGMH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 5 years extra for Persons with Disability.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB in concerned specialty from recognized University/Institution, Registered with Delhi Medical Council (DMC) or proof of having applied

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the SGMH Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download SGMH Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, 5 years extra for Persons with Disability.

content_sections.heading: SGMH Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Salary: Rs. 67700 - 208700 Per Month plus allowances

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SGMH Delhi Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at SGMH Delhi is scheduled for 02 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 58 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident positions at Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is MBBS with a P.G. Degree/Diploma/DNB in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institution, and registration with the Delhi Medical Council (DMC) or proof of application.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts is 45 years, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 67700 to Rs. 208700 per month, plus allowances.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the SGMH Delhi Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Sanjay Gandhi Memorial Hospital, Delhi. The exact venue details are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or ad-hoc job?
faq.answer: The job type for these Senior Resident positions is Ad-hoc.
